reviews.comment:
Me pasó algo tragicómico.  Llené el tanque,  usamos los baños y quisimos comprar solamente medialunas para seguir viaje.  No nos las quisieron vender porque las reservaban para los que iban a desayunar ahí. Parece que el criterio es: no te venden porque se quedan sin para vender a posibles clientes. Digo posibles porque nadie asegura que  las vendieran.
No sería lógico que en plena temporada alta de turismo, reforzaran stock de todo?Cómo se entiende?
Increíble......

(Translated by Google)
Something tragically funny happened to me. I filled up the tank, we used the restrooms, and we wanted to buy some croissants to continue our trip. They wouldn't sell them to us because they were reserving them for people who were going to have breakfast there. It seems their logic is: they won't sell to you because they'll run out to sell to potential customers. I say potential because there's no guarantee they would sell them. Wouldn't it make sense for them to replenish their stock of everything during peak tourist season? How does that make sense?
Unbelievable...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7801942086659808563/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURrci1qOUlBEAE
